title: PlanningSession + Cascata da Vitoria (MVP — v1/v2/v3 progressivos)

userStories.title: Migrations PlanningSession + PlanningSessionPRD (schema + RLS)
userStories.description: Criar 2 migrations conforme §7: 20260601a_planning_session.sql (table com CHECK constraints, EXCLUDE one-active-per-project, RLS, indexes, trigger updatedAt) e 20260601b_planning_session_prd.sql (M:N PRD-Sprint com UNIQUE constraints + RLS). Rodar via psql $DIRECT_URL.
acceptanceCriteria: EXCLUDE constraint bloqueia 2 sessions ativas mesmo projeto

verifiable.command_or_query: psql "$DIRECT_URL" -tAc "SELECT count(*) FROM pg_tables WHERE tablename IN ('PlanningSession','PlanningSessionPRD');"

userStories.title: database.types.ts regen + DAL planning-session (6 fns)
userStories.description: Atualizar database.types.ts incluindo PlanningSession e PlanningSessionPRD. Criar src/lib/dal/planning-session.ts com createSession, getSession (com prds inline), listForProject, updateStatus, updatePrdAssignment, listPrds. RLS respeitada.

userStories.title: buildCodebaseIndex via tree-sitter-wasm + cache por SHA
userStories.description: Adicionar dep tree-sitter-wasm + tree-sitter-typescript. Criar src/lib/agent/planning/codebase-index.ts com buildCodebaseIndex(repoRoot): walk src/**/*.ts(x), parse com tree-sitter, extrai exports/interfaces/DB tables (regex CREATE TABLE)/API routes. Output JSON estruturado. Cache em /tmp/volund-codebase-index/<sha>.json por git SHA.

userStories.title: buildPrdIndex (parse frontmatter + §1-§3 summary + §16 metadata)
userStories.description: src/lib/agent/planning/prd-index.ts: ler docs/prd/{backlog,ready}/prd-*.md, parse YAML frontmatter, extrair slug/title/oneLiner (§2)/problemSummary (§1)/dependsOn (§16)/estimateMinutesTotal/personaIds/riskLevel. Cache por SHA(prd_files concat).

userStories.title: Subagents CodebaseAuditor (sonnet) + DependencyResolver (haiku)
userStories.description: src/lib/agent/planning/subagents/codebase-auditor.ts: callCodebaseAuditor(prdIndex, codebaseIndex) → OpenRouter claude-sonnet-4.6 + Zod schema AuditorOutput. src/lib/agent/planning/subagents/dep-resolver.ts: callDependencyResolver(prdIndex) → claude-haiku-4-5 + Zod DAGOutput. Pattern existente de OpenRouter.

userStories.title: Subagents StoryDecomposer + CapacityAllocator + VitoriaConsolidator
userStories.description: 3 subagents OpenRouter (sonnet) em src/lib/agent/planning/subagents/: story-decomposer.ts (extrai UserStories matched a personas/modules existentes), capacity.ts (aloca PRD→sprint), consolidator.ts (Vitoria strict, ordena outputs sem opinião). Cada um com Zod output schema.

userStories.title: runCascade orchestrator + job worker + cost cap pre-flight
userStories.description: src/lib/agent/planning/cascade.ts: runCascade(sessionId, targetVersion='v1') executa Stage 0 (build indexes), Stage 1A+1B paralelos (Promise.all), Stages 2/5/6/7 sequencial. Cost pre-flight estima tokens, abort se >$3. Persiste agentOutputsJsonb a cada stage. src/lib/jobs/planning-orchestrate-job.ts: worker que invoca runCascade no job system existente.

verifiable.command_or_query: test -f src/lib/agent/planning/cascade.ts && test -f src/lib/jobs/planning-orchestrate-job.ts && echo ok

userStories.title: API routes (5 endpoints: create, orchestrate async, get, drag/drop, abort)
userStories.description: Routes em src/app/api/planning-sessions/: route.ts (POST cria + GET list), [id]/route.ts (GET hidrata), [id]/orchestrate/route.ts (POST→202+jobId), [id]/prds/[prdId]/route.ts (PUT drag/drop), [id]/abort/route.ts (POST aborta). Validation Zod, auth via proxy.ts.

userStories.title: UI Board com sprint columns + drag/drop optimistic
userStories.description: src/components/planning-session/board.tsx reutilizando BoardColumn primitives de design-session/board/. N colunas dinâmicas baseadas em sprintCount. Drag/drop via useOptimisticCollection persistindo PUT. Página /projects/[id]/planning renderiza board + side-sheet pulsante de progress.

userStories.title: Approve flow (transação Postgres atômica + filesystem move backlog→ready)
userStories.description: src/app/api/planning-sessions/[id]/approve/route.ts: POST handler que valida status='in-review', executa transação Postgres (update session.status='approved'+approvedAt+approvedBy, atualiza PlanningSessionPRD). Após commit, executa fs.rename pra mover PRDs backlog/→ready/ na ordem. ConfirmDialog na UI antes do POST.
acceptanceCriteria: Filesystem move via fs.rename após commit

userStories.title: TaskGen server-side function (porta blueprint de /task-gen-story)
userStories.description: src/lib/agent/planning/subagents/task-gen.ts: callTaskGen(userStory, codebaseAuditorOutput) → OpenRouter sonnet com prompt portado de .claude/skills/task-gen-story/SKILL.md. Output Zod TaskGenOutput. NÃO invoca Claude Code CLI — roda 100% server-side via OpenRouter.
acceptanceCriteria: Prompt referencia padrões do skill blueprint

userStories.title: Stage 3 integration + approve persiste UserStory/Task/AC/TaskDependency
userStories.description: Estender runCascade pra Stage 3 quando targetVersion='v2'+: per US extraída em Stage 2, callTaskGen em paralelo. Estender approve route pra criar Module rows greenfield, UserStory (FK PRD), Task (FK US, sddSpec NULL), AcceptanceCriterion, TaskDependency. Tudo dentro da transação atômica.
acceptanceCriteria: Approve cria rows em 5 tabelas existentes

userStories.title: Migration Task.sddSpec column + types regen
userStories.description: supabase/migrations/20260601c_task_sdd_spec.sql: ALTER TABLE Task ADD COLUMN sddSpec text. Index parcial WHERE sddSpec IS NOT NULL. Rodar via psql. Regenerar database.types.ts.

verifiable.command_or_query: psql "$DIRECT_URL" -tAc "SELECT count(*) FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='Task' AND column_name='sddSpec';"

userStories.title: SDDPolish subagent + Stage 4 + render markdown + botão Copiar
userStories.description: src/lib/agent/planning/subagents/sdd-polish.ts: callSDDPolish(task, codebaseAuditorOutput) → OpenRouter sonnet, output Zod {sddSpec: string} em markdown 7-section (Context/Type/Files/Patterns/Steps/AC/Dependencies). Estender cascade pra Stage 4 quando v3. Estender approve pra salvar Task.sddSpec. src/components/hierarchy-tree/task-row.tsx ganha botão 'Copiar SDD' quando sddSpec presente.
